messages.content:
You are an expert chemist. Given the IUPAC representation of compounds, your task is to predict the molecular formula of the compound.
    The input contains the IUPAC representation of the compound. Your reply should contain only the molecular formula of the compound wrapped in <MOLFORMULA> and </MOLFORMULA> tags and no other text. Your reply must be valid and chemically reasonable.
Question: What is the molecular formula of the molecule identified by <IUPAC> [(1R,3S)-2,2-difluoro-3-(phenylmethoxymethyl)cyclopropyl]-phenylmethanol </IUPAC> ?
Answer:
